summary_en: ROE target: 8%+ by FY3/29 (currently 6.1%). Intermediate horizon FY3/29 (3 years). Operating margin to exceed 9.4% via medium-term plan FY2027–FY2029 (sales ¥20B, operating profit ¥2.6B). Payout-ratio floor: ¥40/share minimum dividend (payout ~36% FY3/27 forecast). Focus: geothermal/waste management, social infrastructure, agri-coating, energy-storage materials, cell-culture reagents.
title_en: Update on Measures Toward Management Mindful of Cost of Capital and Stock Price
translation_en_brief:
On 15 May 2026, Kunimine Industries' Board of Directors updated its cost-of-capital and stock-price-focused management initiative. Current-period analysis shows ROE recovered to 6.1% in FY3/26 (up from 5.0%), driven mainly by 1.2-point improvement in operating margin. However, this still falls short of the 8% return general investors typically expect, cited as a factor in the company's persistent sub-1.0x PBR.

The company commits to achieve 8%+ ROE by end of FY3/29 through execution of a new three-year medium-term plan (FY3/27–FY3/29) targeting ¥20 billion revenue and ¥2.6 billion operating profit. Key growth initiatives include geothermal power and radioactive-waste projects (bentonite business), social infrastructure demand, seed-coating services (agri business), energy-storage device materials, and three-dimensional cell-culture technology for diagnostics and drug discovery.

Shareholder-return policy: dividend payout ratio ~30% baseline, with ¥40/share minimum dividend floor, implying FY3/27 payout of ~36%. Enhanced IR to improve investor awareness (shareholder count up to 8,259 by FY3/26 from 4,533 in FY3/24).
